_metadata.name: Equipment Database (Commerce)
_metadata.description: All equipment with cost/rarity data for trading UI. All items verified against Core Rules pp.49-58. Costs are game-balance estimates (Core Rules uses table-roll purchasing at 3 credits per roll). Canonical detailed data lives in: armor.json, consumables.json, utility_devices.json, onboard_items.json, implants.json, weapon_modifications.json.
_metadata.source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules pp.49-58, 125
_metadata.purchase_rules: Pay 3 credits for a roll on Military Weapon, Gear, or Gadget table. Basic items (Hand Gun, Blade, Colony Rifle, Shotgun) cost 1 credit each. Sell up to 3 items for 1 credit each.

weapons.name: Hand Gun
weapons.description: Conventional semi-automatic pistol in a medium caliber.

weapons.name: Hand Cannon
weapons.description: Heavy pistol in a massive caliber.

weapons.name: Scrap Pistol
weapons.description: A pistol pieced together from scavenged parts.

weapons.name: Machine Pistol
weapons.description: A compact, fully automatic firearm in pistol caliber.

weapons.name: Hold Out Pistol
weapons.description: Compact pocket-pistol for personal defense.

weapons.name: Duelling Pistol
weapons.description: Custom-made pistol built for careful aiming.

weapons.name: Colony Rifle
weapons.description: Standard-type defensive rifle, popular with colonists.

weapons.name: Military Rifle
weapons.description: Conventional military automatic rifle.

weapons.name: Auto Rifle
weapons.description: Heavy rifle fitted with an ammo drum for medium-range fire support.

weapons.name: Shotgun
weapons.description: Smooth-bore weapon firing a hail of pellets.

weapons.name: Hunting Rifle
weapons.description: Typical high-caliber rifle for hunting large, dangerous animals.

weapons.name: Marksman's Rifle
weapons.description: Military rifle built for sharp shooting.

weapons.name: Rattle Gun
weapons.description: Conventional machine gun, typically belt-fed.

weapons.name: Flak Gun
weapons.description: Powerful military shotgun for boarding operations.

weapons.name: Shell Gun
weapons.description: Stand-alone grenade launcher, often custom-built.

weapons.name: Hand Laser
weapons.description: Portable energy-based pistol, popular due to ease of use.

weapons.name: Beam Pistol
weapons.description: Military-grade heavy-energy pistol with tightly focused beam.

weapons.name: Blast Pistol
weapons.description: Projects a bolt of searing energy which detonates on impact.

weapons.name: Infantry Laser
weapons.description: Military energy rifle with detachable battery pack.

weapons.name: Blast Rifle
weapons.description: Rifle or carbine energy bolt weapon.

weapons.name: Hyper Blaster
weapons.description: Rapid-fire blast weapon with three rotating barrels.

weapons.name: Fury Rifle
weapons.description: High-powered beam weapon modified from anti-tank designs.

weapons.name: Plasma Rifle
weapons.description: Heavy rifle firing blue-white energy bolts.

weapons.name: Needle Rifle
weapons.description: Uses magnetism to launch razor-sharp needles.

weapons.name: Cling Fire Pistol
weapons.description: Side arm firing a spray of sticky, burning chemicals.

weapons.name: Hand Flamer
weapons.description: Portable flame-throwing device with broad focus.

weapons.name: Blade
weapons.description: Sturdy, light-weight fencing or slashing blade.

weapons.name: Ripper Sword
weapons.description: Short, chopping blade fitted with microscopic teeth.

weapons.name: Boarding Saber
weapons.description: Heavy but carefully balanced sword, often fitted with hand guards.

weapons.name: Brutal Melee Weapon
weapons.description: A heavy, unpleasant-looking weapon for smashing.

weapons.name: Shatter Axe
weapons.description: Bulky weapon that discharges energy as it strikes.

weapons.name: Power Claw
weapons.description: Heavy servo-boosted gauntlet capable of punching through steel.

weapons.name: Glare Sword
weapons.description: Elegant fencing weapon encased in a disruptive energy field.

weapons.name: Suppression Maul
weapons.description: Riot-control weapon that overloads pain receptors.

weapons.name: Frakk Grenade
weapons.description: Explosive charge surrounded by a metal casing.

weapons.name: Dazzle Grenade
weapons.description: Shock charge emitting a loud flash and deafening sound.

armor.name: Frag Vest
armor.description: 6+ Saving Throw, improved to 5+ against any Area attack.

armor.name: Battle Dress
armor.description: +1 Reactions (max 4) and a Saving Throw of 5+.

armor.name: Flex-Armor
armor.description: If the character did not move, +1 Toughness (max 6).

armor.name: Stealth Gear
armor.description: Enemies firing from over 9" are -1 to Hit.

armor.name: Camo Cloak
armor.description: Within 2" of Cover, counts as in Cover. Not if shooter within 4".

armor.name: Deflector Field
armor.description: Automatically deflects one ranged Hit per battle.

armor.name: Flak Screen
armor.description: Area weapons have Damage reduced by -1 (min +0).

armor.name: Screen Generator
armor.description: 5+ Saving Throw against gunfire. No effect against Area or Melee.

gear.name: Booster Pills
gear.description: Remove all Stun markers. Move at double Speed this round.

gear.name: Combat Serum
gear.description: +2" Speed and +2 Reactions for the rest of the battle.

gear.name: Kiranin Crystals
gear.description: Daze all characters within 4" (unable to act this round).

gear.name: Rage Out
gear.description: +2" Speed and +1 Brawling for this and next round. K'Erin: rest of battle.

gear.name: Still
gear.description: +1 to Hit, but cannot Move this and next round.

gear.name: Stim-pack
gear.description: Prevent casualty — remain on table with 1 Stun. Reflexive, no action required.

gear.name: Auto Sensor
gear.description: Fire one Pistol shot at enemies beginning/ending move within 4" and LoS. Hits on natural 6 only.

gear.name: Battle Visor
gear.description: When shooting, reroll any 1s on the firing dice.

gear.name: Communicator
gear.description: Roll one additional Reaction die, then discard one.

gear.name: Concealed Blade
gear.description: Throw at enemy within 2" as Free Action. Damage +0. Once per battle, replaced free.

gear.name: Displacer
gear.description: Once per mission: teleport 1D6" from aimed point. Precursors get two landing points.

gear.name: Distraction Bot
gear.description: Once per battle: enemy within 12" cannot act next activation.

gear.name: Grapple Launcher
gear.description: As Combat Action, scale terrain within 1". Ascend up to 12".

gear.name: Grav Dampener
gear.description: No falling damage. Descend from any height safely. Drop >6" counts as Move.

gear.name: Hazard Suit
gear.description: 5+ Saving Throw against environmental hazard Hits.

gear.name: Hover Board
gear.description: Move up to 9", ignore man-height terrain. No combat while boarding.

gear.name: Insta-Wall
gear.description: Once per mission: place 2" impenetrable force wall within 3". Dissipates on D6=6.

gear.name: Jump Belt
gear.description: Instead of moving: jump 9" forward and 3" up. Combat Action allowed after.

gear.name: Motion Tracker
gear.description: +1 to all Seize the Initiative rolls.

gear.name: Multi-Cutter
gear.description: As Combat Action, cut man-sized hole through terrain up to 1" thick.

gear.name: Robo-Rabbit's Foot
gear.description: Luck 0 counts as 1. Prevents death once (destroyed after).

gear.name: Scanner Bot
gear.description: Crew +1 to all Seize the Initiative rolls.

gear.name: Snooper Bot
gear.description: Ignore Seize the Initiative penalties. Damaged on D6=1.

gear.name: Sonic Emitter
gear.description: Enemies within 5" suffer -1 to all Hit rolls when shooting.

gear.name: Steel Boots
gear.description: On natural 5-6 Brawl win: kick opponent 1D3" back, Damage +0.

gear.name: Time Distorter
gear.description: Freeze up to 3 enemies until end of following round. Single-use.

attachments.name: Assault Blade
attachments.description: Weapon gains Melee trait. Damage +1, wins on Draw.

attachments.name: Beam Light
attachments.description: Increase visibility by +3" in reduced visibility.

attachments.name: Bipod
attachments.description: +1 to Hit over 8" when Aiming or from Cover.

attachments.name: Hot Shot Pack
attachments.description: +1 Damage. Natural 6 on shooting dice causes overheat (inoperable rest of fight).

attachments.name: Shock Attachment
attachments.description: Weapon receives Stun trait against targets within 8".

attachments.name: Quality Sight
attachments.description: +2" Range. Reroll 1s when firing only 1 shot.

attachments.name: Seeker Sight
attachments.description: +1 to Hit if shooter did not Move this round.

attachments.name: Tracker Sight
attachments.description: +1 to Hit if fired at same target last round.
